title: linum suffruticosum subsp. crespoi
intro: Linum suffruticosum subsp. crespoi, also known as Linum crespo, is a subspecies of the flax plant that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and fatty acids, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Linum suffruticosum subsp. crespoi include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Linum suffruticosum subsp. crespoi include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from skin issues to digestive problems.
